title: Revise a board update into an investor-style narrative
prompt: Revise this board update so it works better as an investor discussion deck. Keep the same metrics, but sharpen the growth-quality narrative, clarify the margin story, and end with a cleaner forward view.
acceptanceNotes: The revision should adapt framing for investors without inventing new facts.
The margin and efficiency story should become easier to follow.
The output should remain grounded in the original KPI set.
